---
title: "AWS Emulator with Floci"
---

# AWS Emulator with Floci

This page documents the canonical shared AWS emulator for local development using Floci.

## Overview

Floci is the only local AWS emulator this repo now treats as canonical for development and testing purposes.

## Docker Compose Configuration

The AWS emulator is configured using the following docker-compose file:

```yaml
# Copy-pastable docker-compose.aws-emulator.yml example
version: '3.8'

services:
  # Floci-based AWS emulator services would go here
  # This is a placeholder - actual services defined in docker-compose.aws-emulator.yml
```

See [`docker-compose.aws-emulator.yml`](../docker-compose.aws-emulator.yml) for the complete configuration.

## Purpose

Floci provides a local AWS-compatible environment that replicates AWS services for:
- Local development and testing
- CI/CD pipelines
- Development environment parity

## Related Components

- [Docker Compose AWS Emulator](../docker-compose.aws-emulator.yml): The actual docker-compose file
- [Local Development Guide](03_03-local_development.qmd): How to use the local development environment
- [Infrastructure as Code](03_01-infrastructure_as_code.qmd): Infrastructure provisioning details
